appraisal_events.evidence: « Mais si, c'est chic ! C'était bien les de Cambremer... C'est une marquise. Et authentique. Pas par les femmes. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Mme de Cambremer is singled out as an 'authentic' marquise whose presence makes the occasion 'chic,' reflecting socially endorsed prestige attached to her rank.

status_effects.explanation: Her aristocratic status is publicly recognized and treated as conferring chic, which locally elevates her standing in the conversation.
